description: High-signal ranking relationships used as regression tests for model tuning.

assertions.rationale: Costa is higher in the current snapshot and has a recent LHW win; he should not fall behind lower-snapshot veterans on a close score.
Costa's snapshot support and recent Azamat win should beat Guskov's weaker recent-opponent-quality streak.
Rountree has stronger snapshot/title-lineage context; Jacoby's recent streak should not push him above Rountree.
Jacoby should not be top five unless future data adds stronger elite or snapshot support.
Recent title-level context should keep Topuria in the top three.
Recent head-to-head and contender context should keep Arman above Charles.
Elite resume and recent high-value wins should keep Holloway in the upper top ten.
Paddy should get credit for dominant wins but should not be boosted into the title tier.
Islam is the current welterweight champion in the snapshot.
Recent head-to-head should keep Garry above Prates unless future results change the relationship.
Recent champion/title context should keep JDM in the top eight.
Strickland is the current middleweight champion in the snapshot.
Khamzat's title-lineage context should keep him near the top contender tier.
Pereira's transferred elite light-heavyweight resume should keep him in the heavyweight top five.
